coalitions: Downstream bloc (Uzbekistan-Kazakhstan) rallying around emergency water-safety protections
Upstream bloc (Kyrgyzstan-Tajikistan) resisting binding oversight of their dam infrastructure
China leveraging the dam emergency into bilateral engineering/financing offers, sidelining Russia and India
note: The dam-safety emergency forced a narrow technical protocol under heavy mediator pressure, but the confrontational mood and China's momentum kept the underlying border and resource disputes frozen, letting China consolidate influence while India was boxed out.
